title: Jio Platforms eyes low-orbit satellite rollout as Starlink awaits India launch
summary_full: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.
summary_public: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.
